predicate_mappings.pipeline_quality_indicator_reserved: the quality indicator for {} is reserved
predicate_mappings.pipeline_bound_analyzer: {} is bound to the analyzer plugin {}
predicate_mappings.pipeline_bound_scan_engine: {} is bound to the scan engine {}
predicate_mappings.pipeline_bound_threshold_profile: {} is bound to the threshold profile {}

preconditions: I can only register a pipeline A if it is not the case that A is registered and it is not the case that A is promoted
effects: Once I register a pipeline A, it is the case that A is registered

attach_quality_indicator.description: attach a quality indicator B to a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only attach a quality indicator B to a pipeline A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only attach a quality indicator B to a pipeline A if it is not the case that the quality indicator for A is reserved
effects: Once I attach a quality indicator B to a pipeline A, it is the case that A has the quality indicator B and the quality indicator for A is reserved
Once I attach a quality indicator B to a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_quality_indicator.description: detach a quality indicator B from a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only detach a quality indicator B from a pipeline A if it is the case that A has the quality indicator B
I can only detach a quality indicator B from a pipeline A if it is not the case that A has an evaluation and it is not the case that A is ready for execution
effects: Once I detach a quality indicator B from a pipeline A, it is the case that B is available

Once I detach a quality indicator B from a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that A has the quality indicator B and it is not the case anymore that the quality indicator for A is reserved and it is not the case anymore that the runner for A is activated and it is not the case anymore that the analysis for A is prepared and it is not the case anymore that A requires approval and it is not the case anymore that A has passed verification and it is not the case anymore that A has a verification artifact

allocate_runner_pool.description: allocate a runner pool B to a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only allocate a runner pool B to a pipeline A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I allocate a runner pool B to a pipeline A, it is the case that A is bound to the runner pool B
Once I allocate a runner pool B to a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_runner_pool.description: release a runner pool B from a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only release a runner pool B from a pipeline A if it is the case that A is bound to the runner pool B
effects: Once I release a runner pool B from a pipeline A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a runner pool B from a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the runner pool B

activate_runner.description: activate runner for a pipeline A using a runner pool B
preconditions: I can only activate runner for a pipeline A using a runner pool B if it is the case that A is registered and the quality indicator for A is reserved and A is bound to the runner pool B
I can only activate runner for a pipeline A using a runner pool B if it is not the case that the runner for A is activated
effects: Once I activate runner for a pipeline A using a runner pool B, it is the case that the runner for A is activated

record_approval.description: record approval for a pipeline A by an approver identity B
preconditions: I can only record approval for a pipeline A by an approver identity B if it is the case that A is registered and the quality indicator for A is reserved and B is available
I can only record approval for a pipeline A by an approver identity B if it is not the case that the runner for A is activated
effects: Once I record approval for a pipeline A by an approver identity B, it is the case that the runner for A is activated and A requires approval
Once I record approval for a pipeline A by an approver identity B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

prepare_pipeline_with_credential.description: prepare a pipeline A with a credential C in a runner pool B
preconditions: I can only prepare a pipeline A with a credential C in a runner pool B if it is the case that the runner for A is activated and the quality indicator for A is reserved and A is bound to the runner pool B and C is available
I can only prepare a pipeline A with a credential C in a runner pool B if it is not the case that the analysis for A is prepared
effects: Once I prepare a pipeline A with a credential C in a runner pool B, it is the case that the analysis for A is prepared
Once I prepare a pipeline A with a credential C in a runner pool B, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

bind_tool_integration.description: bind a tool integration B to a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only bind a tool integration B to a pipeline A if it is the case that the quality indicator for A is reserved and A is bound to the tool integration B
I can only bind a tool integration B to a pipeline A if it is not the case that the analysis for A is prepared
effects: Once I bind a tool integration B to a pipeline A, it is the case that the analysis for A is prepared
Once I bind a tool integration B to a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

bind_analyzer_plugin.description: bind an analyzer plugin B to a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only bind an analyzer plugin B to a pipeline A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I bind an analyzer plugin B to a pipeline A, it is the case that A is bound to the analyzer plugin B
Once I bind an analyzer plugin B to a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_analyzer_plugin.description: unbind an analyzer plugin B from a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only unbind an analyzer plugin B from a pipeline A if it is the case that A is bound to the analyzer plugin B
effects: Once I unbind an analyzer plugin B from a pipeline A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind an analyzer plugin B from a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the analyzer plugin B

bind_ruleset.description: bind a rule set B to a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only bind a rule set B to a pipeline A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I bind a rule set B to a pipeline A, it is the case that A is bound to the ruleset B
Once I bind a rule set B to a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_ruleset.description: unbind a rule set B from a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only unbind a rule set B from a pipeline A if it is the case that A is bound to the ruleset B
effects: Once I unbind a rule set B from a pipeline A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a rule set B from a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the ruleset B

bind_scan_engine.description: bind a scan engine B to a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only bind a scan engine B to a pipeline A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I bind a scan engine B to a pipeline A, it is the case that A is bound to the scan engine B
Once I bind a scan engine B to a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_scan_engine.description: unbind a scan engine B from a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only unbind a scan engine B from a pipeline A if it is the case that A is bound to the scan engine B
effects: Once I unbind a scan engine B from a pipeline A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a scan engine B from a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the scan engine B

stage_threshold_profile.description: stage a threshold profile B to a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only stage a threshold profile B to a pipeline A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I stage a threshold profile B to a pipeline A, it is the case that A is bound to the threshold profile B
Once I stage a threshold profile B to a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unstage_threshold_profile.description: unstage a threshold profile B from a pipeline A
preconditions: I can only unstage a threshold profile B from a pipeline A if it is the case that A is bound to the threshold profile B
effects: Once I unstage a threshold profile B from a pipeline A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unstage a threshold profile B from a pipeline A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the threshold profile B

execute_evaluation_profile.description: execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin C and a rule set D
preconditions: I can only execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin C and a rule set D if it is the case that the quality indicator for A is reserved and A is bound to the analyzer plugin C and A is bound to the ruleset D and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin C and a rule set D if it is not the case that A has an evaluation
effects: Once I execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin C and a rule set D, it is the case that A has an evaluation result for the profile B and A has an evaluation
Once I execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin C and a rule set D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

execute_evaluation_with_scanner.description: execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using a scan engine C with an artifact D
preconditions: I can only execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using a scan engine C with an artifact D if it is the case that the quality indicator for A is reserved and A is bound to the scan engine C and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with D
I can only execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using a scan engine C with an artifact D if it is not the case that A has an evaluation
effects: Once I execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using a scan engine C with an artifact D, it is the case that A has an evaluation result for the profile B and A has an evaluation and A has a verification artifact and A requires approval
Once I execute an evaluation profile B on a pipeline A using a scan engine C with an artifact D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

verify_evaluation_result.description: verify evaluation result for a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B and a rule set C
preconditions: I can only verify evaluation result for a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B and a rule set C if it is the case that A has an evaluation and A has a verification artifact and A is bound to the analyzer plugin B and A is bound to the ruleset C
effects: Once I verify evaluation result for a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B and a rule set C, it is not the case anymore that A has a verification artifact and it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

apply_team_policy_approval.description: apply team policy approval to a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B, a rule set C, and a team policy D
preconditions: I can only apply team policy approval to a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B, a rule set C, and a team policy D if it is the case that the analysis for A is prepared and A has an evaluation and A is bound to the analyzer plugin B and A is bound to the ruleset C and A is bound to D

I can only apply team policy approval to a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B, a rule set C, and a team policy D if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that A is ready for execution
effects: Once I apply team policy approval to a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B, a rule set C, and a team policy D, it is the case that A is ready for execution

apply_org_policy_approval.description: apply org policy approval to a pipeline A using a scan engine B, a threshold profile C, and an org policy D
preconditions: I can only apply org policy approval to a pipeline A using a scan engine B, a threshold profile C, and an org policy D if it is the case that the analysis for A is prepared and A has an evaluation and A is bound to the scan engine B and A is bound to the threshold profile C and A is bound to D
I can only apply org policy approval to a pipeline A using a scan engine B, a threshold profile C, and an org policy D if it is not the case that A is ready for execution
effects: Once I apply org policy approval to a pipeline A using a scan engine B, a threshold profile C, and an org policy D, it is the case that A is ready for execution and A requires approval

finalize_evaluation.description: finalize evaluation of a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B and a rule set C
preconditions: I can only finalize evaluation of a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B and a rule set C if it is the case that A is ready for execution and A requires approval and A is bound to the analyzer plugin B and A is bound to the ruleset C
effects: Once I finalize evaluation of a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B and a rule set C, it is the case that A has passed verification

Once I finalize evaluation of a pipeline A using an analyzer plugin B and a rule set C, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval and it is not the case anymore that the analysis for A is prepared and it is not the case anymore that A has a verification artifact

reprepare_pipeline_with_credential.description: reprepare a pipeline A with a runner pool B using a credential C
preconditions: I can only reprepare a pipeline A with a runner pool B using a credential C if it is the case that A has passed verification and A is ready for execution and the quality indicator for A is reserved and A is bound to the runner pool B and C is available
I can only reprepare a pipeline A with a runner pool B using a credential C if it is not the case that the analysis for A is prepared
effects: Once I reprepare a pipeline A with a runner pool B using a credential C, it is the case that the analysis for A is prepared

stage_threshold_on_runner_pool.description: stage threshold for a pipeline A on a runner pool B
preconditions: I can only stage threshold for a pipeline A on a runner pool B if it is the case that A is ready for execution and the analysis for A is prepared and A is bound to the runner pool B
I can only stage threshold for a pipeline A on a runner pool B if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that A is staged for threshold
effects: Once I stage threshold for a pipeline A on a runner pool B, it is the case that A is staged for threshold

stage_threshold_with_approver.description: stage threshold for a pipeline A with an approver identity B
preconditions: I can only stage threshold for a pipeline A with an approver identity B if it is the case that A is ready for execution and the analysis for A is prepared and B is available
I can only stage threshold for a pipeline A with an approver identity B if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that A is staged for threshold
effects: Once I stage threshold for a pipeline A with an approver identity B, it is the case that A is staged for threshold
Once I stage threshold for a pipeline A with an approver identity B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

apply_threshold_profile_via_tool.description: apply threshold profile to a pipeline A via a tool integration B
preconditions: I can only apply threshold profile to a pipeline A via a tool integration B if it is the case that A is staged for threshold and B is available and A is compatible with the tool integration B
effects: Once I apply threshold profile to a pipeline A via a tool integration B, it is the case that A is bound to the release tool integration B
Once I apply threshold profile to a pipeline A via a tool integration B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

promote_tool_binding_to_release.description: promote tool binding of a feature pipeline A to release using a release pipeline B and a tool integration C
preconditions: I can only promote tool binding of a feature pipeline A to release using a release pipeline B and a tool integration C if it is the case that A is registered and A has a feature variant flag and A has requested the tool integration C and B is bound to the release tool integration C
I can only promote tool binding of a feature pipeline A to release using a release pipeline B and a tool integration C if it is not the case that A is bound to the tool integration C
effects: Once I promote tool binding of a feature pipeline A to release using a release pipeline B and a tool integration C, it is the case that A is bound to the tool integration C

mark_pipeline_credentials_ready.description: mark credentials for a pipeline A as ready using a runner pool B and a credential C
preconditions: I can only mark credentials for a pipeline A as ready using a runner pool B and a credential C if it is the case that A is registered and A has a feature variant flag and the analysis for A is prepared and A is staged for threshold and A is bound to the runner pool B and C is available
I can only mark credentials for a pipeline A as ready using a runner pool B and a credential C if it is not the case that credentials for A are prepared
effects: Once I mark credentials for a pipeline A as ready using a runner pool B and a credential C, it is the case that credentials for A are prepared

promote_pipeline_via_final_gate.description: promote a pipeline A via final gate
preconditions: I can only promote a pipeline A via final gate if it is the case that A has a release variant flag and A is registered and the quality indicator for A is reserved and A has an evaluation and A is ready for execution and A is staged for threshold and the analysis for A is prepared
I can only promote a pipeline A via final gate if it is not the case that A is promoted
effects: Once I promote a pipeline A via final gate, it is the case that A is promoted

promote_pipeline_with_tool_evidence.description: promote a pipeline A with tool evidence from a tool integration B
preconditions: I can only promote a pipeline A with tool evidence from a tool integration B if it is the case that A has a feature variant flag and A is registered and the quality indicator for A is reserved and A has an evaluation and A is ready for execution and A is staged for threshold and the analysis for A is prepared and A is bound to the tool integration B
I can only promote a pipeline A with tool evidence from a tool integration B if it is not the case that A is promoted
effects: Once I promote a pipeline A with tool evidence from a tool integration B, it is the case that A is promoted

promote_pipeline_with_additional_verific.description: promote a pipeline A with additional verification
preconditions: I can only promote a pipeline A with additional verification if it is the case that A has a feature variant flag and A is registered and the quality indicator for A is reserved and A has an evaluation and A is ready for execution and A is staged for threshold and the analysis for A is prepared and credentials for A are prepared
I can only promote a pipeline A with additional verification if it is not the case that A is promoted
effects: Once I promote a pipeline A with additional verification, it is the case that A is promoted

action_nl_templates.stage_threshold_with_approver: stage threshold for pipeline {?pipeline} with approver identity {?approver_identity}

action_nl_templates.promote_tool_binding_to_release: promote tool binding of feature pipeline {?feature_pipeline} to release using release pipeline {?release_pipeline} and tool integration {?tool_integration}

action_nl_templates_indef.apply_org_policy_approval: apply org policy approval to a pipeline {?pipeline} using a scan engine {?scan_engine}, a threshold profile {?threshold_profile}, and an org policy {?org_policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_evaluation: finalize evaluation of a pipeline {?pipeline} using an analyzer plugin {?analyzer_plugin} and a rule set {?rule_set}
action_nl_templates_indef.reprepare_pipeline_with_credential: reprepare a pipeline {?pipeline} with a runner pool {?runner_pool} using a credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.stage_threshold_on_runner_pool: stage threshold for a pipeline {?pipeline} on a runner pool {?runner_pool}
action_nl_templates_indef.stage_threshold_with_approver: stage threshold for a pipeline {?pipeline} with an approver identity {?approver_identity}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_threshold_profile_via_tool: apply threshold profile to a pipeline {?pipeline} via a tool integration {?tool_integration}
action_nl_templates_indef.promote_tool_binding_to_release: promote tool binding of a feature pipeline {?feature_pipeline} to release using a release pipeline {?release_pipeline} and a tool integration {?tool_integration}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_pipeline_credentials_ready: mark credentials for a pipeline {?pipeline} as ready using a runner pool {?runner_pool} and a credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.promote_pipeline_via_final_gate: promote a pipeline {?pipeline} via final gate
action_nl_templates_indef.promote_pipeline_with_tool_evidence: promote a pipeline {?pipeline} with tool evidence from a tool integration {?tool_integration}
action_nl_templates_indef.promote_pipeline_with_additional_verific: promote a pipeline {?pipeline} with additional verification

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a pipeline or a quality indicator or a evaluation profile or a rule set or a analyzer plugin or a scan engine or a runner pool or a approver identity or a tool integration or a credential or a artifact or a threshold profile or a governance policy is also a object
Everything that is a team policy or a org policy is also a governance policy
Everything that is a release pipeline or a feature pipeline is also a pipeline
